sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61489" key="laganofakh=" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾰγᾰνοφᾰκῆ</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n61489.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lentil pudding</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cake</tr_>, Bilabel <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ὀψαρτ</foreign>. <bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Lond.:p.11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
